name: Aimfinity Investment Corp. I Warrant
summary: Aimfinity Investment Corp. I Warrant represents a warrant to purchase shares of Aimfinity Investment Corp. I, a special purpose acquisition company (SPAC). A warrant gives the holder the right, but not the obligation, to buy the company's stock at a specific price within a certain timeframe. SPACs typically seek to merge with a private company, allowing the private company to become publicly listed.
